title: Solenangis wakefieldii

The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The bioactive constituents of Solenangis wakefieldii include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and alkaloids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. taxonomy: Solenangis wakefieldii is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. This genus belongs to the subfamily Orchidoideae.
